xt":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.901c446764fac8","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/389425.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【成为熔断警察，是我一直以来的志向！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"西比尔到熔断警备署报道的那天，心情格外好。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她从小的志向，就是加入E.O.S.，成为一名熔断警察。在她看来这是无比光荣的职业，她将会像每一个熔断警察那样奔赴熔断发生的前线，与熔断生物战斗，救助每一个被困的人类或异格者。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我一定会认真对待每一次任务，并不停磨练自己的战斗力！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"西比尔这样想着，走进了警备署，一个人事科的警员接待了她。在带她参观了一圈警备署后，警员将西比尔的入职资料交给了她。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"西比尔看着入职资料上写的职位，愣住了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「特别调查小组？那是什么？之前没听说过啊……」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【这份工作和希望中的好像有点不一样……】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"西比尔面对着堆成小山的文件，发出一声无奈的叹息。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她已经加入熔断警备署两年了，在这期间，她一直认真工作，并因此升为了特别调查小组的组长。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"唯一让她有些遗憾的是特别行动小组的工作，虽然也有亲自前往现场调查的任务，但大多数时候是侦查和整理情报，并不会直接参与救援或与熔断生物对抗，而且，这份工作更多时候，是留在办公室整理资料。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这和预想的可不太一样啊……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但是很快的，她就又打起了精神，她拍了拍自己的脸，鼓励自己。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没关系……即使没办法亲自前往救援现场，我的工作也能给更多困于危险中的人带去帮助！要加油啊！」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【虽然如愿以偿，但也预示着危险……】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"随着源病毒和熔断在艾尔特利斯各处爆发，熔断警备署的工作量直线上升。不仅是外勤队伍每天加班，就连西比尔所在的特别行动小组也经常被调去协助，正面与熔断生物交锋的次数也逐渐增多。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"某种意义上，这也算是让西比尔如愿以偿了，但她却开心不起来。源病毒爆发频率加剧，意味着人们陷入危险的几率更高了。相比起打倒熔断生物带来的满足感，西比尔更希望艾尔特利斯的人们能够安居乐业。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但是源病毒是不讲道理的。熔断警备署用尽了手段，能做到的也只是尽量降低熔断爆发后造成的损失，尽可能地拯救生还者。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「再这么下去，大家只会被永无止境的源病毒爆发拖垮……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"当想到这里的时候，西比尔突然冒出了一个想法——能不能有办法提前预知源病毒爆发的地点，或者找到源病毒爆发的原因、进行预防。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"于是西比尔重新做起了过去一直在做的事情一—侦查、收集和整理情报。就算希望渺茫，她也想要试试看。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，爆伤，爆伤/攻击加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"作为水系单体输出表现还可以，适合打源器本奥洛拉"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12洞悉穿刺+8狂怒+6爆裂利刃"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"启示录"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":161,"height":160},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_551/h_445/50364/842288/2025/7/18/327831.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"cid4PsgQFSbvOeU8","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
